conversation_metadata.mismatch_test_note: Current scorer is expected to miss much of the trust/literacy/identity-continuity signal because it still uses business-oriented dimensions.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Hi — what would you like help with today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: is this anthropic? I changed my chip and now everything looks different

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: I can help orient you. Are you trying to recover something from a previous AI app, or just understand what this assistant can do?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I had one before that helped me write messages for customers but I deleted it. I don't know if this is the same one.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: We can rebuild the workflow even if it is not the same app. What kind of customer messages did it help with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: People ask price and if I can deliver. I don't want it to sound copied from internet.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Okay — I can help draft short customer replies. Do you want a friendly tone, a formal tone, or something in between?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: in between. but don't save my number or make it connected to the old app.
